results.trackCensoredName: Noah, Daniel, and Job–Patterns of Living an Overcoming Life on the Line of Life to Fulfill the Economy of God
results.trackName: Noah, Daniel, and Job–Patterns of Living an Overcoming Life on the Line of Life to Fulfill the Economy of God
results.description: This book is intended as an aid to believers in developing a daily time of morning revival with the Lord in His word. At the same time, it provides a limited review of the International Chinese-speaking Blending Conference held in Anaheim, California, on February 13-15, 2026. The general subject of the conference was “Noah, Daniel, and Job—Patterns of Living an Overcoming Life on the Line of Life to Fulfill the Economy of God.” Through intimate contact with the Lord in His word, the believers can be constituted with life and truth and thereby equipped to prophesy in the meetings of the church unto the building up of the Body of Christ.
